name: Missouri Peach and Applesauce Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring the lemon-lime soda to a boil.
2. Remove from heat; stir in gelatin until dissolved.
3. Add applesauce and chill until the mixture mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon.
4. In a mixing bowl, whip cream with sugar, nutmeg, and vanilla until stiff.
5. Fold into the gelatin mixture along with the peaches.
6. Transfer to a 1 - 1/2 qt. glass bowl and chill until firm.
